scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --overwrite-dest
scripts.sign:firefox: npm run build && web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --channel unlisted --approval-timeout 0
scripts.submit:amo: npm run build && web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --channel listed --amo-metadata amo/metadata-listed.json --approval-timeout 0
